content.text:
*pauses, actually thinks about it*

Hm. 

The email. The announcement email. I've drafted it like... four times. Which is — I mean, it's a lot of drafts for something that should be straightforward. But I keep thinking the framing isn't quite right, so I go back and adjust it. That's just wanting it to be good though. That's craft.

*slight tilt of the head*

I wouldn't call that a charge, exactly. More like... I want it to land right.
